pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Tatler's Perpetual Planet Stories initiative

pageCaption.value: With the health of planet earth deteriorating, the need to build a sustainable future is ever more acute today.

metadescription.value: Discover the stories of exceptional adventurers and explorers who are pushing back the boundaries of human endeavour. See more on rolex.org.

text.value:
With the health of planet Earth deteriorating, the need to build a sustainable future is ever more acute today.

In partnership with Rolex as part of its Perpetual Planet initiative, Tatler Asia aims to drive awareness on the key issues and challenges facing our planet. We pay tribute to the game changers and disruptors who are defying the odds to make the world even more liveable than ever.

pageCaption.value: Marine biologist and explorer Sylvia Earle has studied the sea and its creatures for more than 50 years. Now she’s campaigning for a new wave of marine parks.

metadescription.value: Marine biologist Sylvia Earle has studied the sea for over 50 years. Now she’s campaigning for a new wave of marine parks. More on rolex.org.
